content:
the new chat were updated in 2.0
so maybe some inconsistencies 
although the true Erica is still in there so not that far off
Ts is from Sanga side story
Did the male mc lift his skirt also?
to be honest the male protag is obviously just identical in every way to the female protag but with a catholic boys school approved™️ haircut <:finger:1234798285466632212>
Can someone retell me Miryam desecration story in a short way? Thank you!
Anyone who beat the main story, could you tell me if we get to murk Juliette by the end of the story main story or is it going to go the classic gatcha route and its open ended?
Girl joins a cult, becomes a high priestess despite not believing a thing and hating the whole thing and starts believing the lie as her land is destroyed
Girlboss gaslit herself so hard that when she reincarnates, she starts doing a lot of heinous shit to recreate her make-believe heaven
Thats about the shortest possible description, but it is one of the better written stories in the game, its 100% worth reading
I figured all the side stories were mc taking over the minds of side characters, but that visual is hilarious
didn't male MC become a female when dream diving? the role here is Sanga's best friend or something
same way female mc become a male if you dream dive other short stories, you basically bodyswapped with other people

||not really, she does get her comeuppance but it's a little anti-climactic unfortunately since they had to cram a whole arc into one chapter. it's self-inflicted comeuppance, in fact the protagonist sort of tries to save her, but she's definitely dead by the end||
